scripts.build: bun run build:node && bun run build:rn && bun run build:types
scripts.build:node: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --external react --external react-native --external react-native-reanimated --external react-native-gesture-handler --external @gorhom/bottom-sheet --external @cloudflare/react-native-webrtc --external @chalk/core
scripts.build:rn: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist/react-native --target browser --external react --external react-native --external react-native-reanimated --external react-native-gesture-handler --external @gorhom/bottom-sheet --external @cloudflare/react-native-webrtc --external @chalk/core
